name: Moo Goo Gai Peen
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the chicken for 20 minutes, allow it to cool and slice into pieces.
2. String the snow peas. Slice the mushrooms, cabbage and water chestnuts thinly.
3. Heat a skillet or wok, then add the peanut oil and salt. Just before the oil begins to smoke, add all the vegetables and stir-fry for 1/2 minute.
4. Add the water, cover and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add the chicken, cornstarch mixture, pepper and sugar. Stir until the sauce is thickened.
